title: [kimi-review] 7f85d1d: [SEVERITY: high] Empty diff: the commit claims to add a boun
description:
Commit: 7f85d1d69
Message: fix(meshcore): bounds check payload_len in encode_pending_text()

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] Empty diff: the commit claims to add a bounds check for `payload_len`, but no code changes are included. Either the fix was never actually committed (misleading/no-op commit) or the diff was truncated. The fix cannot be verified and, as presented, the vulnerability it claims to address remains unpatched.
